name: claude-ads
description: Comprehensive paid advertising audit and optimization skill for Claude Code. Covers Google, Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, and Microsoft Ads with 190 audit checks, industry-specific templates, parallel subagent delegation, weighted scoring, conversion tracking analysis, and creative quality assessment.

findings_summary.notes: Substantial and well-organized advertising audit skill with a main ads/SKILL.md plus 12 sub-skills (ads-google, ads-meta, ads-youtube, ads-linkedin, ads-tiktok, ads-microsoft, ads-creative, ads-landing, ads-budget, ads-plan, ads-competitor, ads-audit), 6 parallel subagent definitions, and reference documentation. The SKILL.md has proper YAML frontmatter with allowed-tools scoped to Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, WebFetch. The install.sh script clones the repo via git into ~/.claude/skills/ and ~/.claude/agents/ — no binary downloads, transparent installation. Python scripts reviewed: fetch_page.py fetches landing pages for quality analysis using standard urllib/requests (no credentials, no sensitive data exfiltration). capture_screenshot.py uses Playwright for screenshots. analyze_landing.py performs HTML analysis. All scripts are well-documented, single-purpose, and contain no dangerous patterns. Research files are thorough advertising audit references. Industry templates (SaaS, e-commerce, local-service, etc.) in ads-plan/assets/ are markdown templates. MIT licensed. No obfuscation, no hardcoded credentials. The install.ps1 is a PowerShell equivalent with the same logic. High-quality, domain-specific skill.
